label: About Me
title: About James
body: I am a Texas State CS grad with a passion for coding. I built my first PC at ten, fell in love with how games work, and never looked back. Since then I've built projects across C++, Java, JavaScript, Python, HTML, and Go. Projects ranging from games and web apps to lower level systems. I'm early in my career, but I learn fast, communicate clearly, and care about writing code I can stand behind.
